name: PointList
summary: The PointList class defines a type safe point list.

constructors.name: PointList
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PointList class

methods.name: Add
methods.summary: Adds a new point to the end of the point list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to be added to the list.

returns.doc: The index where the point was added.

methods.name: AddRange
methods.summary: Appends all points from another point list to the end of this point list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The points to be added to the list.

methods.name: Contains
methods.summary: Checks if the given point is in the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to be checked.

returns.doc: True if the point is in the list, otherwise false.

methods.name: GetRange
methods.signature: public PointList GetRange(int index, int count)
methods.summary: Gets a part of the point list.

params.name: index
params.doc: The start index of the new list.

params.name: count
params.doc: The number of items in the new list.

methods.name: IndexOf(Point)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified point.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to locate in the list.

returns.doc: The index of the point if found in the list, otherwise -1.

methods.name: IndexOf(Point, Int32)
methods.signature: public int IndexOf(Point value, int startIndex)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified point between the index to start the search from and the end of the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to locate in the list.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index to start the search from.

returns.doc: The index of the point if found in the list, otherwise -1.

methods.name: IndexOf(Point, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public int IndexOf(Point value, int startIndex, int count)
methods.summary: Gets the index of the specified point between the index to start the search from and startIndex + count.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to locate in the list.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index to start the search from.

params.name: count
params.doc: The number of items searched.

returns.doc: The index of the point if found in the list, otherwise -1.

methods.name: Insert
methods.signature: public void Insert(int index, Point value)
methods.summary: Inserts the point to the specified index.

params.name: index
params.doc: The index where the point is inserted.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to be inserted.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(Point)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the point in the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to locate.

returns.doc: The last index of the point if found, otherwise -1.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(Point, Int32)
methods.signature: public int LastIndexOf(Point value, int startIndex)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the point in the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to locate.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index to start the search from.

returns.doc: The last index of the point if found, otherwise -1.

methods.name: LastIndexOf(Point, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public int LastIndexOf(Point value, int startIndex, int count)
methods.summary: Searches for the last occurence of the point in the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to locate.

params.name: startIndex
params.doc: The index to start the search from.

params.name: count
params.doc: The number of items searched.

returns.doc: The last index of the point if found, otherwise -1.

methods.name: Remove
methods.summary: Removes the first occurence of the point from the list.

params.name: value
params.doc: The point to be removed.

methods.name: RemoveRange
methods.signature: public void RemoveRange(int index, int count)
methods.summary: Removes a range of items starting from the given index.

params.name: index
params.doc: The start index.

params.name: count
params.doc: The number of items to be removed.

methods.name: ToArray
methods.summary: Copies the points to a point array.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the point at the specified index.
